commands.review_summary:
The PR bounds response body reads in OpenRouter OAuth, Google OAuth token grant handling, and Discord gateway metadata text parsing.

PR surface: Source +14. Total +14 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows Discord gateway startup routes through fetchDiscordGatewayMetadataGuarded, which materializes the guarded response with arrayBuffer before this PR's later limited text read would run; I did not run a live oversized-body repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed to decide whether to close/split the mixed branch, because the Discord subset has a stronger open replacement while the unique OAuth subset lacks real behavior proof.

target.title: fix(openrouter,google): bound OAuth response body reads
target.body:
Bound two unbounded response body reads to prevent potential OOM across bundled plugins.

### Changes

1. **extensions/openrouter/oauth.ts** — The success path in `readResponseBody` used unbounded `await response.text()` while the error path already used `readResponseTextLimited`. Added `OPENROUTER_OAUTH_RESPONSE_BODY_LIMIT_BYTES` (16 KiB) for the OK path.

2. **extensions/google/oauth.token.ts** — Both the error text extraction and the JSON response in `requestTokenGrant` were unbounded. Replaced with `readResponseTextLimited(response, 4 KiB)` for error text and `readProviderJsonResponse` for the success JSON body.

### Notes

- Discord metadata bounding was dropped from this PR — it is already covered more comprehensively by #97721 (maintainer PR, includes `materializeGuardedResponse` + tests).
- This follows the same project-wide bound-response-read pattern as recent fixes like #97702, #88401, #97615.

### Verification

- ✅ `pnpm test extensions/openrouter` — 10 files, 113 tests passed
- ✅ `pnpm test extensions/google/oauth.test.ts` — 1 file, 27 tests passed
- ✅ `pnpm tsgo:extensions` — clean

### AI-Assisted

This PR was AI-assisted.
